languages.text:
{n}Сержант проводит Ведку долгим взглядом:{/n}{br}
"Вот уж упрямая она, эта Дунавски..."

{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."
languages.original_text:
{n}Сержант проводит Ведку долгим взглядом:{/n}{br}
"Вот уж упрямая она, эта Дунавски..."

traits.locale_text:
{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."

{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."

{n}The sergeant surveys Dunawski with a long look.{/n}{br}
"Still, she's hardheaded and a good sort, Dunawski. I like her, even though she's a pain in the backside sometimes."

{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."

{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."

languages.text: {n}軍曹はダナウスキーをじっと見つめた。{/n}{br}「それでも、彼女は頑固で、いい人だ。時々面倒なこともあるけど、私は彼女が好きだ」
languages.original_text:
{n}The sergeant surveys Dunawski with a long look.{/n}{br}
"Still, she's hardheaded and a good sort, Dunawski. I like her, even though she's a pain in the backside sometimes."

traits.locale_text: 「それでも、彼女は頑固で、いい人だ。時々面倒なこともあるけど、私は彼女が好きだ。」

languages.text: {n}Çavuş, Dunawski'nin gidişini izliyor.{/n} "Şu Dunawski de ne inatçı."
languages.original_text:
{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Çavuş, Dunawski'nin gidişini izliyor.{/n} "Şu Dunawski de ne inatçı."

languages.text:
{n}El sargento observa cómo Dunawski se marcha.{/n}{br}
«Sí que es testaruda Dunawski...».
languages.original_text:
{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."

traits.locale_text:
{n}El sargento observa cómo Dunawski se marcha.{/n}{br}
«Sí que es testaruda Dunawski...».

languages.text:
{n}军士注视着杜纳芙斯卡离去的背影。{/n}{br}
“她可真倔，那个杜纳芙斯卡……“
languages.original_text:
{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."

languages.text:
{n}Le sergent regarde Dunawski s'en aller.{/n}{br}
« Têtue comme une mule, cette Dunawski... »
languages.original_text:
{n}The sergeant watches Dunawski leave.{/n}{br}
"She's a stubborn one, that Dunawski..."

traits.locale_text:
{n}Le sergent regarde Dunawski s'en aller.{/n}{br}

languages.text:
{n}Der Sergeant blickt Dunawski nach.{/n}{br}
"Ein stures Luder diese Dunawski ..."
